Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class BinaryInteractionParameterAdapter

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.BinaryInteractionParameterAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, ParameterUpdateAdapter
public class BinaryInteractionParameterAdapter extends Object implements ParameterUpdateAdapter
Parameter adapter for fitting one binary interaction parameter on a thermodynamic system.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • BinaryInteractionParameterAdapter

      public BinaryInteractionParameterAdapter(SystemInterface system, String component1, String component2, FittingParameter parameter)
      Creates a binary interaction parameter adapter.
      Parameters:
      system - thermodynamic system to update
      component1 - first component name
      component2 - second component name
      parameter - fitting parameter definition
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any required input is null

  • Method Details

    • getParameters

      public FittingParameter[] getParameters()
      Returns parameter definitions handled by this adapter.
      Specified by:
      getParameters in interface ParameterUpdateAdapter
      Returns:
      parameter definitions in fitting order

      Applies physical parameter values to the target model.
      Specified by:
      applyParameters in interface ParameterUpdateAdapter
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - physical parameter values in fitting order

      Returns the thermodynamic system updated by this adapter.
